title: MultiSearchOutput
description: Multi-query JSON envelope emitted by `duckduckgo-search-cli` when multiple queries are passed. v0.9.8 agent-ready defaults: default `--vertical all`, content fetch ON (opt-out `--no-fetch-content`). Each `buscas[]` item is a full SearchOutput ($ref search-output.schema.json) and may carry agent chrome metadata on `metadados` (`chrome_path_resolvido`, `chrome_canal`, honest `usou_chrome`) — not telemetry.

quantidade_queries.description: Number of queries in this batch.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the batch start.

buscas.description: Per-query SearchOutput envelopes, in execution order. v0.9.8: default vertical is `all` (web+news); content fetch ON unless `--no-fetch-content`. v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): with --vertical news|all each item may carry optional news fields (noticias[], quantidade_noticias, metadados.vertical_usada) — one Chrome session per query. Because items $ref search-output.schema.json, each inherits SearchMetadata agent fields `chrome_path_resolvido` / `chrome_canal` / `usou_chrome` (not telemetry).

causa_zero_histogram.description: v0.8.0+: Histogram of `causa_zero` values across all queries in this batch. Keys are kebab-case cause names; values are occurrence counts. BTreeMap iteration order (lexicographic) ensures deterministic output.
